_note: Product template (catalog-linked): displays products from a Commerce Manager catalog. Product image, title, and price are pulled automatically — no manual fields needed per element, only the retailer ID. Prerequisites: Commerce Manager account, product catalog linked to the Instagram Business Account, products must be active and commerce-eligible. Use 'elements[].id' (retailer ID from Catalog → Items → Retailer ID column) — NOT 'product_elements[].id'. Max ~10 elements.
